channel.title: NAS Ravindran, LN P, NK Channaveerachari, SP Seshadri, S Kasi, SK Manikappa, AV Cherian, S Palanimuthu T, P Sudhir, R Govindan, BR P, AD Christopher, S George | PlatCOVID

item.title: Crossing barriers: Role of a tele-outreach program addressing psychosocial needs in the midst of COVID-19 pandemic.
